problem: Why does biological neural computation use 20W while AI uses megawatts — what is different?
hypothesis: If Federated learning without data centralization is applied to what, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Hardware prototype with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
